subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto her who turned, hearkened, and proclaimed: "Here am I, O Lord of Eternity! Here am I, O Thou Desire of all beings!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا للتی اقبلت و سمعت و قالت لبیک یا مالک القدم و لبیک یا مقصود من فی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @consolation and comfort, @prayer for protection
